input.headline: Dancing with the Stars' season 34: See who was eliminated, who's headed to finale

raw.headline: Dancing with the Stars' season 34: See who was eliminated, who's headed to finale

winner: Which celebrity danced their way off the stage faster than a twirling sequined skirt on a windy night? The one who was eliminated from Dancing with the Stars' season 34!

candidates.text: Why did the dancer refuse to go to the finale of Dancing with the Stars' season 34? Because he was eliminated from going to see who's headed there!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with a play on the headline, but it's a bit forced and lacks punch. The setup and punchline are loosely connected, and the humor feels more contrived than surprising."}

candidates.text: Why don't finalists on Dancing with the Stars ever get lost? Because they always follow the elimination line!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the topic but lacks originality and surprise; 'elimination line' is a weak pun that doesn't fully connect to the context of the show."}

candidates.text: Why did the star refuse to dance in the final of Dancing with the Stars' season 34? Because it had already been eliminated from the competition!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the show, but it's a bit generic in its setup and relies on a pun that may not land as strongly due to the slight inconsistency (refusing to dance in the final after being eliminated)."}

candidates.text: Which celebrity danced their way off the stage faster than a twirling sequined skirt on a windy night? The one who was eliminated from Dancing with the Stars' season 34!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is creative and uses a vivid metaphor, but the punchline is slightly delayed and could be more concise for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: The stars were dancing, but unfortunately, they weren't twirling in a circle of friendship anymore.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and uses a play on words with 'circle of friendship,' but it lacks specificity about the show's events and feels a bit generic and forced."}
